message: fix: normalize bun test paths in harness

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
     "check": "biome check --write .",
     "check:ci": "bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run check:architecture && bun run test:unit:parallel",
     "check:deep": "bun run check:ci && bun run deadcode && bun run deps:cycles",
-    "check:architecture": "bun run check:host-guardrails && bun test test/architecture",
+    "check:architecture": "bun run check:host-guardrails && bun test ./test/architecture",
     "check:host-guardrails": "bash scripts/check-host-session-controller-boundaries.sh",
     "deadcode": "bun run deadcode:report",
     "deadcode:report": "bun run deadcode:report:deps && bun run deadcode:report:exports",
@@ -26,16 +26,16 @@
     "lint": "biome lint .",
     "format": "biome format --write .",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit --project web/tsconfig.json",
-    "test": "bun test",
+    "test": "bun test ./test ./web/src",
     "test:flake": "bash scripts/test-flake.sh bun run test:unit:parallel",
     "test:unit": "bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-unit-files.sh",
     "test:unit:parallel": "bash scripts/run-tests-parallel-from-list.sh scripts/test-unit-files.sh",
     "test:integration": "VCR_MODE=replay bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-integration-files.sh",
     "test:integration:record": "VCR_MODE=record bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-integration-files.sh",
     "test:integration:live": "VCR_MODE=off bash scripts/run-tests-from-list.sh scripts/test-integration-files.sh",
-    "test:all": "bun test",
+    "test:all": "bun test ./test ./web/src",
     "test:parallel": "bash scripts/test-parallel.sh",
-    "test:watch": "bun test --watch",
+    "test:watch": "bun test --watch ./test ./web/src",
     "postinstall": "cd web && bun install",
     "precommit": "bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit:parallel",
     "build:harbor-agent": "bun scripts/build-sprout-binary.ts",

@@ -1,18 +1,21 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -euo pipefail
 
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+source "$ROOT_DIR/scripts/test-paths.sh"
+
 if (( $# != 1 )); then
 	echo "Usage: $0 <list-script>" >&2
 	exit 1
 fi
 
 list_script="$1"
-list_output="$(bash "$list_script")"
+list_output="$(bash "$ROOT_DIR/$list_script")"
 
 declare -a test_files=()
 while IFS= read -r path; do
 	if [[ -n "$path" ]]; then
-		test_files+=("$path")
+		test_files+=("$(normalize_test_path "$path")")
 	fi
 done <<< "$list_output"
 
@@ -21,4 +24,5 @@ if (( ${#test_files[@]} == 0 )); then
 	exit 1
 fi
 
+cd "$ROOT_DIR"
 bun test "${test_files[@]}"

@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@
 set -euo pipefail
 
 ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+source "$ROOT_DIR/scripts/test-paths.sh"
 cd "$ROOT_DIR"
 
 if [[ -n "${TEST_JOBS:-}" ]]; then
@@ -33,11 +34,11 @@ fi
 declare -a files=()
 if (( $# > 0 )); then
   for path in "$@"; do
-    files+=("$path")
+    files+=("$(normalize_test_path "$path")")
   done
 else
   while IFS= read -r path; do
-    files+=("$path")
+    files+=("$(normalize_test_path "$path")")
   done < <(find test web/src -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' \) | sort)
 fi

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+
+normalize_test_path() {
+	local path="$1"
+
+	# Bun drops child-process output for some subprocess-heavy tests when the test
+	# file is invoked via a bare relative path like "test/foo.test.ts".
+	case "$path" in
+		/*|./*|../*)
+			printf '%s\n' "$path"
+			;;
+		*)
+			printf './%s\n' "$path"
+			;;
+	esac
+}
